title: Fix 6j5 Query system P1/P2 issues from review
description: 3 P1 and 4 P2 issues found in b914e92 (query system commit). P1.1: pointer invalidation in advanceStates (use-after-free from append while holding pointer). P1.2: currentFieldID() stub always returns 0, field matching silently broken. P1.3: alternation patterns match any node via wildcard collision. P2.1: quantifier fork creates incorrect capture state. P2.2: linear scan instead of binary search on pattern map. P2.3: no test coverage for runtime matching engine. P2.4: uint16 overflow risk for large queries. Assigned to coder-1, will fix after wcu.4.
